import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { useNavigate, Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import api from '../axios'; export default function Login() { const [email, setEmail] = useState(''); const [password, setPassword] = useState(''); const [error, setError] = useState(''); const navigate = useNavigate(); async function handleSubmit(e) { e.preventDefault(); try { const { data } = await api.post('/auth/login', { email, password }); localStorage.setItem('token', data.token); navigate('/'); } catch (err) { setError('Invalid credentials'); } } return (
